Submit your job listing, get reviewed, pay once — and your vacancy reaches thousands of job seekers on our Telegram channel automatically.

HOW IT WORKS
FOUR STEPS
TO GO LIVE
01

Sign up

Create your employer account. We verify your company within 24 hours.

02

Submit vacancy

Fill in your job post. Our team reviews every listing for quality.

03

Pay once

200 Birr via Telebirr or CBE Birr. 500 Birr for featured with TikTok video.

04

Go live

Your job post is automatically published to our Telegram channel instantly.

PRICING
ONE POST.
ONE PRICE.

Standard Post

200 Birr
  • Posted to Telegram channel
  • Seen by thousands daily
  • Shared on our social pages
  • Active for 30 days
  • Email confirmation
Most Popular

Featured Post

500 Birr
  • Everything in Standard
  • We make a TikTok video for your job
  • Pinned in Telegram channel
  • Priority 24h review
  • Active for 60 days
  • Maximum reach
